facts.statement: Mount Everest is over 9,000 meters tall
Mount Everest's South Base Camp is below 5,000 meters
The nearest sea to Mount Everest is over 1,000 km away
facts.actual: The Bay of Bengal is almost 700 km away

facts.statement: Fewer than 100 climbers' bodies remain on Mount Everest
facts.actual: Over 200 bodies remained on the mountain as of 2015

facts.statement: Mount Everest's North Base Camp is above 6,000 meters
